subcodes.first_line: In this day the atoms of existence are immersed in joy, for the True Beloved, Who had been eternally concealed, hath been unveiled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز ذرات کائنات بعیش مشغولند چه که محبوب حقیقی که لازال در ستر بوده کشف
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @chastisement and requital, @spiritual transformation
